title: NaN Health Fix Neo
description: Fixed the issue where mobs with NaN health could not die properly.
body:
This mod resets the health of any entity whose health value becomes NaN back to **0**, allowing it to die normally.
It is a **1.21.1 NeoForge remake** of the original mod [NaN Health Fixer](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nan-health-fixer), which has not been updated for a long time.
